results.notes: Body is empty stub returning []. Card text 'Whenever a player attacks with three or more creatures' requires aggregate attack-counting tracking that's not supported by ATTACK_DECLARED helper.
results.engine_gap: No event aggregating per-turn attacker count; would need attack-declaration phase summary or a multi-attack trigger helper.

results.notes: Body implements both ETB and attack triggers, creating two 2/1 black/green Spider tokens with menace and reach. Skips the optional 'collect evidence 4' gate (always creates), which is a safe approximation.
Body counts Elves and Wolves on the battlefield, adds X +1/+1 counters to each creature controlled (X = elves), and draws cards equal to wolves. Both subroutines fully implemented.
Body is empty stub returning []. Effect 'gain control of target permanent you own but don't control' requires targeting + control-change machinery.
results.engine_gap: Targeting prompt for own-but-not-controlled permanent + GAIN_CONTROL event.

results.notes: Body is empty stub returning []. Effect 'tap target creature, optionally stun-counter' requires player targeting prompt.

Body has a no-op ETB (would need targeting for -4/-4) but the secondary 'creature cards leave graveyard' trigger is fully implemented (each opponent loses 1, you gain 1). Wiring captures the working half.
Body is empty stub returning []. Requires 'sacrifice an artifact OR discard a card' player choice plus +2/+0 conditional buff.
results.engine_gap: Cost-choice prompt (sac artifact vs discard) and conditional draw/buff.

results.notes: name_mismatch resolved: card text matches INCINERATOR_OF_THE_GUILTY (line 5355). However body is an empty stub. Effect 'collect evidence X to deal X damage to each creature/planeswalker' requires collect-evidence machinery.
results.engine_gap: Collect-evidence player choice + variable-X damage to multiple targets.

results.notes: Body is empty stub returning []. Requires collect-evidence 3 + targeted +1/+1 counter.
Body is empty stub returning []. 'Target creature blocks this turn if able' requires targeting + must-block forcing.
results.engine_gap: Targeting prompt + forced-block flag on creature.

results.notes: name_mismatch resolved: card is 'Rune-Brand Juggler' (RUNEBRAND_JUGGLER at line 6337). Body is empty stub returning []. Effect requires targeting + suspect mechanic which has no engine support across the file.
results.engine_gap: Suspect mechanic (menace + can't-block flag granted to a creature) and targeting.

results.notes: Body is empty stub returning []. Effect 'target creature gains indestructible until end of turn' requires targeting + temporary keyword grant.
results.engine_gap: Targeting prompt + until-end-of-turn keyword grant scoped to a single target.

results.notes: Original get_instant_sorcery_count was a placeholder returning 0, leaving Melek as 0/0. Fixed to iterate state.objects, count instants/sorceries in controller's graveyard, then double. QUERY_POWER/QUERY_TOUGHNESS handlers now produce live values. Cost-reduction half (first instant/sorcery costs {3} less) still unimplemented but harmless.
results.engine_gap: Once-per-turn cost reduction tracking for first instant/sorcery cast.
